_meta.description: Umbrella app for consumer/resident-facing workforce tools. Each tool is self-contained and can be added/removed without affecting others.

categories.label: Re-Entry & Second Chance
categories.description: Tools for people re-entering the workforce after jail, recovery, or supervision

categories.label: Job Search & Career
categories.description: Tools for finding work, understanding wages, and mapping career paths

categories.label: Training & Credentials
categories.description: Tools for finding training programs, credentials, and funding

categories.label: Support Services
categories.description: Tools for connecting to housing, childcare, transportation, legal help

tools.name: From Paper to Pathway
tools.description: A workbook that helps you prepare to talk with employers about where you've been and where you're going. For people re-entering the workforce after jail, recovery, or supervision.
tools.audience: People re-entering the workforce; workforce coaches; facilitators
what_you_get: A draft of your story in your own words
Three job ideas that match your skills
A resource directory for what you need help with
tools.privacy_note: Your answers stay on this device only. Nothing is sent over the internet.

tools.name: Hamilton County Wage Explorer
tools.tagline: See what jobs pay near you
tools.description: A plain-language view of wages by occupation in Hamilton County. Drawn from public BLS data.
what_you_get: Median and typical wage range for hundreds of occupations
How your skills might translate to different jobs

tools.name: Training Finder
tools.tagline: What can you learn, and who pays for it?
tools.description: A guide to short-credential, certificate, and degree programs in Hamilton County and central Indiana — with funding pathways (WIOA, Ivy Tech grants, employer-sponsored).
tools.audience: People considering retraining, new credentials, or career moves
what_you_get: Programs matched to the kind of work you want
Funding programs you might qualify for

tools.name: Support Services Directory
tools.description: A curated directory of the support services that make work possible. Filtered by what you need.
tools.audience: Anyone who needs help with the things that get in the way of working
what_you_get: Phone numbers and addresses that are up to date
Clear info on who qualifies for what
